title: APC InRow Cooling SNMP Supply Air Temperature Deviation
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:cooling"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=cooling sourcetype="snmp:apc:cooling" earliest=-4h
| eval supply=tonumber(coalesce(airIRSupplyAirTemperature, supply_air_temp_f, ""))
| eval setpoint=tonumber(coalesce(airIRSetpointTemperature, supply_setpoint_f, ""))
| eval delta=abs(supply-setpoint)
| where delta>3
| timechart span=15m avg(delta) by unit_name
description: Supply air off setpoint implies fan, coil, or control valve issues in row-based cooling.
value: Protects hot-aisle containment performance and ASHRAE envelopes.
implementation: (1) Units °F vs °C consistently. (2) Correlate with CRAH return sensors.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Power spikes during equipment power cycling, scheduled load shifting, or DR drills.
